claimRule: The label 10/10 PRODUCTION_READY is allowed only when all ten gates are CLOSED_VERIFIED through source, test, artifact, run proof and visible countercheck.

parallelLineBoundary.reason: Growth audit PR #92 found no shared integration smoke with the newer Studio, browser and Pages chain on main.

gates.title: Installation und erster Start reproduzierbar
gates.doneWhen: A clean supported machine can follow one documented mouse-first setup path and reach the public or local Studio without hidden shell knowledge.

gates.title: Nullwissen-Onboarding vollständig
gates.doneWhen: A first-time operator completes orientation, project opening, status reading and the safe practice flow without outside help.

gates.title: Canon- und Freigabegrenzen verständlich
gates.doneWhen: The operator can distinguish selected pilot, candidate, review-required item, approved master and final episode.

gates.title: Character-, Set- und Voice-Workflow geführt
gates.doneWhen: Every master type has a guided source-bind, candidate, review, revision, approval and versioning path.

gates.title: Episode-Workflow geführt
gates.doneWhen: An operator can move one episode from brief through script, storyboard, assets, edit, sound, subtitles, QA and export.

gates.title: QA und sichtbare Reviews vollständig
gates.doneWhen: Technical, creative, continuity, audio, subtitle and export reviews have explicit pass, revise and reject decisions.

gates.title: Backup, Delete und Restore geprüft
gates.doneWhen: The operator can delete working state, retain the package and restore the exact SHA-256 state.

gates.title: Fehlerdiagnose und Recovery geführt
gates.doneWhen: Common setup, source, state, package, browser, media and provider failures have operator-visible diagnosis and safe next actions.

gates.title: Export und Übergabe reproduzierbar
gates.doneWhen: Episode package, media export, subtitles, evidence and handoff manifest are produced and verified from the same version.

gates.title: Vollständiger Nullwissen-Abnahmelauf
gates.doneWhen: A person with no prior knowledge follows the manual and video, completes a safe practice episode flow, and passes the acceptance checklist without undocumented help.

forbiddenClaims: production ready before a complete reviewed episode exists
beginner ready before the novice acceptance run
visual consistency before approved masters exist
Growth OS live or integrated into main
